Public Contact Appendix

Grouped contacts for people who need the full table.

Use this appendix when you need the contact table behind the guide. Confirm phone numbers, emails, addresses, and current submission paths before direct outreach.

Choose the lighter route

Use the full table only when a table is the job.

For guided discovery, start with Network or the Ask directory button. Stay here when you need county/community grouping, contact details, or spreadsheet-style review.

The appendix keeps as much information as possible for outreach and correction work. If a detail looks old, submit an update with the source that should be checked.

Listing updates

Update the appendix

Use this when the contact table needs a new row, a correction, a better source link, or a note that a listing may be outdated. Submissions are starting points for review, not automatic publication.

What to include

Name, county, community, website or source link, contact route, short description, audience served, and what action a reader should take.

Placeholder intake contact

Email: updates@statelineguide.example
Phone: (575) 000-0000
Mail: 000 Main Street, Raton, NM 87740

Open submission form

Next action

  • Search by need instead of table order
  • Find event calendars, newsletters, visitor guides, and directory channels
  • Submit an appendix correction with a public source link
  • Understand how the three counties connect

Immediate directory

Find the right route.

Search by need, county, town, audience, or task. Results include practical links and update reminders so users can act without treating old details as final.

Results update after submitting the form or after a short pause while typing. Press Escape to close this panel.

Open resource directory Submit a correction

Colfax NM + Las Animas CO + Huerfano CO

This guide helps businesses, artists, nonprofits, programs, venues, and service providers find the right regional route faster.

See something outdated? Send a source link through Submit Update so the guide can improve.
